title: Master Engineering Object Schema
description: Unified base specification structure for all engineering references in HADALBORE LAB.

type.description: General domain category (e.g. Tubular, Thread, Elastomer, Fluid).

name.description: Official reference engineering name (e.g. L80, Viton FKM).

aliases.description: Alternative names, translations or industry shorthands.

description.description: General description of the material or spec.

standards.description: Governing regulatory standard documents (e.g. API 5CT, ISO 11960).

chemicalComposition.description: Key elements, compound concentrations or molecular structure.

chemicalCompatibility.description: Compatible fluids or chemical resistance lists.

usedInEquipment.description: Downhole, offshore or surface equipment this object is part of.

limitations.description: Operating envelopes, corrosion triggers or structural limits.

applications.description: Primary usage scopes (e.g., sour wells, completion packoffs).

diagrams.description: SVG schematics reference IDs associated with this object.

graphs.description: Graph plots or performance charts IDs associated.

sources.description: Reference sources used to compile the technical data.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last database verification.

revisionDate.description: Release date of the revision source.
